notableEvents.label: Allowed 95.3 mph to Jung Hoo Lee
Nolan Arenado grand slam · Bot 1
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Arenado hits a grand slam (7) to left field. Ketel Marte scores. Corbin Carroll scores. Geraldo Perdomo scores.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Waldschmidt steals
notableEvents.detail: Bot 2 · 1–4 · Ryan Waldschmidt steals (2) 2nd base. Ryan Waldschmidt to 3rd. Ryan Waldschmidt advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Eric Haase.

notableEvents.label: With Ryan Waldschmidt picked off
notableEvents.detail: Bot 3 · 2–7 · With Ryan Waldschmidt batting, Tim Tawa picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, second baseman Luis Arraez.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Arenado — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Bot 5 · 2–12 · Nolan Arenado reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Willy Adames. Ketel Marte scores. Geraldo Perdomo to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Arenado reached on error · Bot 5
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Arenado reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Willy Adames. Ketel Marte scores. Geraldo Perdomo to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Ildemaro Vargas GIDP · Bot 8
notableEvents.detail: Ildemaro Vargas grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Jesus Rodriguez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Adrian Del Castillo out at 2nd. Ildemaro Vargas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Fielding error vs Geraldo Perdomo · Bot 1

notableEvents.label: Fielding error vs Nolan Arenado · Bot 5
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Arenado reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Willy Adames. Ketel Marte scores. Geraldo Perdomo to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jesus Rodriguez pinch-hit · Groundout
notableEvents.detail: Jesus Rodriguez grounds out, third baseman Nolan Arenado to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas.

notableEvents.label: Rafael Devers GIDP · Top 8
notableEvents.detail: Rafael Devers grounds into a double play, second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman James McCann. Casey Schmitt out at 2nd. Rafael Devers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Rafael Devers rally-killer GIDP · Top 8
notableEvents.detail: Rafael Devers grounds into a double play, second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman James McCann. Casey Schmitt out at 2nd. Rafael Devers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jesus Rodriguez pinch-hit · Groundout
notableEvents.detail: Jesus Rodriguez grounds out, third baseman Ildemaro Vargas to first baseman Jose Fernandez.
